title: No Country for Old People: A Nursing Home Exposé
original_title: No Country For Old People; a Nursing Home Exposé
overview: A cautionary tale exposing decades of lethal neglect in Nursing Facilities. A systemic crisis caused by an industry that subscribes to the notion that honesty is far less profitable than dishonesty and views human beings as commodities.
